name: docs-guide-codex
description: Codex-native official documentation lookup with llms.txt-first retrieval and official fallbacks.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch official docs live instead of relying on model memory
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `docs-guide` skill with an `llms.txt`-first retrieval strategy, known-site index, and official-source fallback chain for version-aware documentation answers.
defaultPrompt: Look up the official docs for this library and explain the relevant section with citations.
Fetch the current official documentation for this API and tell me what changed.
Use docs-guide to answer this version-sensitive library question from official sources only.
